highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.148.0 ships the v4 line stable ã Skia m148, variable fonts, animated WebP and a modernised API.
highlights_body: The first stable v4 release rolls up the 4.147 previews ã Skia m132/m133/m147, variable-font shaping, animated WebP encoding, zero-copy SKStream.GetData and refreshed native dependencies ã then adds RC1 stabilization: Skia m148, two SKPixmap span-correctness fixes, singleton-lifecycle rework, promotion of legacy paint text/font APIs to error, and a WinUI Projection DLL fix for .NET 9.

breaking.title: Typeface defaults are resolved eagerly through the font manager
breaking.body: Skia m132 removed the lazy "resolve default at draw time" pattern. `new SKFont()` now stores `SKTypeface.Empty` (0 glyphs) instead of `null`, so an unset font measures/draws nothing ã construct with `new SKFont(SKTypeface.Default)` and detect "unset" with `Typeface.IsEmpty`. `SKTypeface.FromFamilyName("missing")` and `SKTypeface.Default` now go through the font manager and are non-null on every platform (Android used to return `null` for a missing family). Use `SKFontManager.Default.MatchFamily(name)` for strict null semantics. `new SKPaint().Typeface` similarly returns `SKTypeface.Default` instead of `null` ã measurement still works.

breaking.title: SKStream.Move(long) throws on out-of-range offsets and is now obsolete
breaking.body: The underlying `sk_stream_move` offset is a 32-bit int, but the `Move(long)` overload used an unchecked cast that silently wrapped. It is now a checked cast that raises `OverflowException` for large offsets, and the overload is marked `[Obsolete]` (CS0618). Call `Move(int)` with an in-range value ã validate/clamp large offsets yourself.

breaking.title: Vulkan backend context and Ycbcr conversion structs restructured
breaking.body: `GRVkBackendContextNative` drops `fMinAPIVersion`, `fInstanceVersion`, `fExtensions`, `fFeatures` and `fOwnsInstanceAndDevice` ã use `fVkExtensions`, `fDeviceFeatures`/`fDeviceFeatures2`, and delete the ownership flag. `GrVkYcbcrConversionInfo` gains a `Components` field (new `GRVkYcbcrComponents` struct), changing its layout. `GRVkImageInfo.YcbcrConversionInfo` retypes to `GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo` and loses value-equality; compare fields explicitly.

breaking.title: Legacy SKPaint text/font APIs and remaining pre-v4 obsoletes are now errors
breaking.body: The last SKPaint text and font state-reading members and the remaining pre-v4 obsoletes are promoted from warning to error, and the obsolete enum members are trimmed from the reference assembly. Move text metrics and drawing to `SKFont` and `SKTextBlob` per the v3ãv4 migration guide.

breaking.title: SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose is now read-only
breaking.body: The public setter on `SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose` was removed as part of the singleton lifecycle rework; the flag is managed internally. Callers that assigned it were reaching into internal state ã remove the assignment.

bullets.lead: Skia updated through m132, m133, m147 and m148
bullets.detail: The v4 line lands with four engine bumps stacked ã the m132 baseline, m133, m147, and the m148 upgrade that finalises the stable release, plus two upstream chrome/m147 bug-fix rolls.

bullets.lead: Legacy typeface bridge kept working during the upgrade
bullets.detail: Adds `sk_fontmgr_legacy_create_typeface` so the managed default-typeface fallback keeps working on top of the newer engine.

bullets.lead: Native dependencies refreshed
bullets.detail: Bumps zlib to 1.3.2.1-motley, libpng to 1.6.58, libexpat to 2.7.5 then 2.8.1, freetype to 2.14.3, libjpeg-turbo to 3.1.4.1 and HarfBuzz to 14.2.0 to pick up upstream fixes.

bullets.lead: Variable-font shaping and color-font palettes
bullets.detail: Adds variable-font support across SkiaSharp and HarfBuzzSharp and improves color-font palette handling and variable-font robustness for OpenType axis animation and emoji palettes.

bullets.lead: SKSurface and SKCanvas draw APIs take SKSamplingOptions
bullets.detail: `SKSurface.Draw` and `SKCanvas.DrawSurface` gain sampling-options overloads so callers can pick the sampling quality when composing surfaces.

bullets.lead: Animated WebP encoding via SKWebpEncoder
bullets.detail: New encoder support for writing multi-frame animated WebP images from SkiaSharp.

bullets.lead: Zero-copy SKStream.GetData()
bullets.detail: Exposes the underlying SkData directly, avoiding the buffer copy previously required to convert a stream into an SKData.

bullets.lead: HBColor struct and misc HarfBuzzSharp API fills
bullets.detail: Adds an `HBColor` value type for a proper `hb_color_t` representation and fills in missing wrappers while cleaning up naming-convention violations.

bullets.lead: SKPixmap/SKBitmap pixel-span stride corrected
bullets.detail: `GetPixelSpan` now uses `RowBytes` for stride instead of a computed value, and the `GetPixelSpan<T>(x, y)` offset uses `Width` instead of `Height` ã both fixes prevent out-of-bounds and incorrect pixel access on non-tightly-packed images.

bullets.lead: SKPath finalizer crash when SKPathBuilder is collected first
bullets.detail: Fixes a lifetime bug where the SKPath finalizer could touch a freed native handle when the builder finalized first.

bullets.lead: SKGLView redraws after MAUI TabBar tab switches on Android
bullets.detail: Restores rendering when an SKGLView is hosted inside a MAUI TabBar and the tab is switched away and back.

bullets.lead: WinUI Projection DLL located on .NET 9
bullets.detail: Fixes a DllNotFoundException for the WinUI projection assembly when consumed from .NET 9 apps.

bullets.lead: Singleton instance lifecycle reworked
bullets.detail: Reworks how singleton native instances are held and disposed so process shutdown and app-domain teardown no longer race with finalizers; `SKNativeObject.IgnorePublicDispose` is now managed internally.

bullets.lead: Default typeface resolution moved to the managed layer
bullets.detail: Wraps upstream's non-null Default with a managed fallback so every platform gets consistent behaviour and Android API 36+ no longer crashes when the font manager returns null.

bullets.lead: Native-compat gate moved to the SkiaApi cctor
bullets.detail: The native runtime-compat check runs from the `SkiaApi` static constructor instead of a `[ModuleInitializer]`, so it triggers only when the native API is actually touched and plays well with trimming and NativeAOT.

bullets.lead: Warnings-as-errors across binding/
bullets.detail: Turns on `TreatWarningsAsErrors` for the binding project and cleans up every warning so regressions are caught at build time.

bullets.lead: SkiaSharpGenerator updated and runs on Linux
bullets.detail: Bumps CppAst to 0.21.4 and fixes the generator so C API bindings can be regenerated on Linux, not just Windows.

bullets.lead: PolySharp brings C# 13 to legacy target frameworks
bullets.detail: Adopts PolySharp so the binding project can use C# 13 language features across all target frameworks, including the legacy ones.

bullets.lead: Linux Bionic (Android-native) assets
bullets.detail: Publishes Linux Bionic native assets so SkiaSharp can be consumed from Android-native (bionic) runtimes, not just the managed Android target.

bullets.lead: Tizen native builds for x64 and arm64
bullets.detail: Adds x64 and arm64 architectures to the Tizen native build matrix.

bullets.lead: Apple TFMs move to 26.0 for libraries
bullets.detail: Aligns Apple-platform target frameworks with the new 26.0 SDKs for libraries while keeping apps on the unversioned TFM.

bullets.lead: WebAssembly requires .NET 8+ Emscripten
bullets.detail: Drops native WebAssembly builds against pre-.NET 8 Emscripten so the WASM binaries stay aligned with the supported runtime.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Delivered variable-font shaping, reworked singleton lifecycles, promoted the legacy SKPaint text/font APIs to error, moved default-typeface resolution to managed code, fixed the SKPath finalizer crash, and unblocked the SkiaSharpGenerator on Linux with the m147 engine bump
contributor_summaries.4Darmygeometry: Added Linux Bionic native assets and adopted PolySharp so binding/ can use C# 13 on legacy TFMs
contributor_summaries.ebariche: Kept CI green by fixing samples, Docker, NanoServer, coverlet and the build chain
contributor_summaries.sasakrsmanovic: Refreshed the devcontainers by splitting them into managed and native configurations
contributor_summaries.SimonvBez: Fixed SKGLView not rendering after tab switches inside a MAUI TabBar on Android

preview_summaries.rc1: Release Candidate 1 stabilised the line for stable ã the Skia m148 bump, two SKPixmap span-correctness fixes, singleton-lifecycle rework, the final promotion of legacy paint text/font APIs to error, the WinUI Projection DLL fix, and the expat 2.8.1 and HarfBuzz 14.2.0 dependency refreshes.
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 landed the variable-font palettes, HBColor struct, animated WebP encoding and the CI/build hardening work.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 opened up SKSurface/SKCanvas sampling options and shipped SKStream.GetData(), plus the SKPath finalizer fix.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 cut the v4 line ã Skia m132/m133/m147 engine bumps, the managed default-typeface bridge, Linux Bionic assets and Tizen x64/arm64 support.
